# kCATransactionAnimationTimingFunction | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Animation ](/documentation/quartzcore)

- [ kCATransactionAnimationTimingFunction ](/documentation/quartzcore/kcatransactionanimationtimingfunction)

-  kCATransactionAnimationTimingFunction 

Global Variable# kCATransactionAnimationTimingFunction

iOS 3.0+iPadOS 3.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.6+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCATransactionAnimationTimingFunction: String
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/quartzcore/kcatransactionanimationtimingfunction#Discussion)

An instance of [`CAMediaTimingFunction`](/documentation/quartzcore/camediatimingfunction) that overrides the timing function for all animations triggered within the transaction group.

## [See Also](/documentation/quartzcore/kcatransactionanimationtimingfunction#see-also)

### [Constants](/documentation/quartzcore/kcatransactionanimationtimingfunction#Constants)

[`let kCATransactionAnimationDuration: String`](/documentation/quartzcore/kcatransactionanimationduration)Duration, in seconds, for animations triggered within the transaction group.[`let kCATransactionDisableActions: String`](/documentation/quartzcore/kcatransactiondisableactions)A key whose value indicates whether implicit actions for property changes made within the transaction group are suppressed.[`let kCATransactionCompletionBlock: String`](/documentation/quartzcore/kcatransactioncompletionblock)
